episodes.title: 'King of the World' statue shows Trump with Epstein in DC
episodes.description:
'King of the World' statue shows Trump with Epstein in DC

A new art installation by the anonymous artist collective Secret Handshake appeared this week on the National Mall in Washington, D.C., depicting figures representing President Donald Trump and the late financier Jeffrey Epstein.

The installation, titled "King of the World," portrays the two figures in a recreation of an iconic scene from the film Titanic featuring characters Jack and Rose.

Plaques placed alongside the sculpture reference allegations of social connections between Trump and Epstein. The installation also includes a row of large banners featuring an image of the two men together.

REUTERS VIDEO

episodes.title: Police continue search for Quiboloy at church compound in Davao City
episodes.description:
Police continue search for Quiboloy at church compound in Davao City

Police continue its search for Kingdom of Jesus Christ Pastor Apollo Quiboloy at the church compound in Davao City on Sept. 3, 2024, the 11th day since troops were deployed to the city to serve a warrant of arrest on the self-proclaimed 'son of God' on charges of human trafficking and child abuse, among others. 

VIDEO BY PNA
